$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

actions.description: Actions available to be performed during the benchmarker run.

artifacts.description: Artifacts to produce from the data collected during the benchmarker run.

loads.description: Loads that can be applied to the system under test during the benchmarker run.

resources.description: Pool of uss_qualifier resources available for use by other resources in this benchmark configuration.

scenarios.description: The sequential list of scenarios to perform in the benchmarker run.

user_types.description: Types of users available to load the system under test during the benchmarker run.
